app.name: DTF Salary Tracker

auth.loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.networkError: Cannot reach the authentication service. Check your connection or VPN and try again.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Please click the verification link we sent.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.passwordWeak: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with letters and numbers.
auth.signupDisabled: New sign-ups are disabled. Contact the administrator for access.
auth.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your registered email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetLinkSentDescription: If the email is registered, you'll receive a password reset email. Redirecting to login in {countdown} seconds...
auth.passwordRequirements: Requirements: At least 8 characters with letters and numbers
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Password reset successfully! Redirecting to login in {countdown} seconds...
auth.resetPasswordError: Reset failed. Please try again or request a new reset link
auth.invalidResetToken: Reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one
auth.passwordTooWeak: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with letters and numbers
